summary: Comprehensive testing of user signup and onboarding flows. All backend tests pass (10/10). Frontend testing confirms both independent and organization signup paths work correctly with proper status handling.
critical_code_review_comments: SMS notification to super admin is MOCKED - Twilio phone number +15552698119 is not valid, logs warning but doesn't fail signup
Two onboarding flows exist: /onboarding/index.tsx (persona wizard) and /onboarding.tsx (checklist). Users see persona wizard first, then restricted access if pending.
seed_data_creation: Test users created and cleaned up during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: User signup and onboarding flows verified. Independent users get status='active', needs_onboarding=true. Organization users get status='pending'. Pending users see 'Access Pending' screen on restricted tabs (inbox, dialer, contacts). More tab remains accessible. Admin approve endpoint changes status to 'active'. Store detail page returns users and available_users correctly.

features_tested.pending_count_returns_correct_value: PASS - Count increases after org signup
features_tested.pending_count_unchanged_by_independent: PASS - Independent signup doesn't affect pending count
features_tested.admin_approve_with_store_assignment: PASS - User gets assigned to store during approval
features_tested.store_detail_users_have_required_fields: PASS - _id, name, email, role, is_active present
features_tested.pending_user_can_login: PASS - Returns token with status='pending' in user object
features_tested.frontend_restricted_access_screen: PASS - Pending users see 'Access Pending' screen with lock icon on inbox
features_tested.frontend_onboarding_wizard: PASS - Persona wizard shows for new users
features_tested.frontend_greyed_tabs: PASS - Restricted tabs appear greyed out for pending users

mocked_apis.SMS notification: MOCKED - Super admin notification attempts to use Twilio but fails due to invalid phone number, logs warning
